title: Small Totem Pack
description: A clean and stylish Minecraft totem pack with custom design and ThunderDeathYT branding.
body:
**Better Totem Pack** is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack that makes the **Totem of Undying appear smaller on your screen**.
This is especially useful for PvP, since the normal totem can block a big part of your view during fights.

✨ Features

* 🔹 **Smaller Totem Size** – The Totem of Undying takes up less space on your screen.
* 🔹 **PvP-Friendly** – Keeps your view clear during combat.
* 🔹 **Lightweight** – Simple change, no heavy textures.
* 🔹 **Version Support** – Works with Minecraft **1.21+** (also supports 1.20.x).
* 🔹 **Made by ThunderDeathYT** – Community-made pack for better PvP visibility.

💡 Why use this pack?

If you find the default totem distracting or covering too much of your screen, this pack gives you a **cleaner PvP experience** by making it smaller.
